steps.title: Separate fixed and extra cost
steps.content: The first $3$ hours cost $880$ dollars. Since the rental lasts $t$ hours and $t>3$, the number of additional hours is $t-3$.

steps.title: Write the total cost
steps.content:
The extra cost is $60(t-3)$ dollars, so the total cost is
$$880+60(t-3)$$

steps.title: Set the total equal
steps.content:
The total cost is $1{,}120$ dollars, so the equation is
$$880+60(t-3)=1{,}120$$
The answer is C.
